crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects calls to base64 encoded WMI class such as "Win32_ShadowCopy", "Win32_ScheduledJob", etc.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell - PS Script
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects deletion of Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Execution of Powershell with Base64
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Commandline to launch powershell with a base64 payload
Detects non-interactive PowerShell activity by looking at the "powershell" process with a non-user GUI process such as "explorer.exe" as a parent.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Load Of RstrtMgr.DLL By An Uncommon Process
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects the load of RstrtMgr DLL (Restart Manager) by an uncommon process.
This library has been used during ransomware campaigns to kill processes that would prevent file encryption by locking them (e.g. Conti ransomware, Cactus ransomware). It has also recently been seen used by the BiBi wiper for Windows.
It could also be used for anti-analysis purposes by shut downing specific processes.

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Observed ZeroSSL SSL/TLS Certificate
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Observed ZeroSSL SSL/TLS Certificate"; flow:from_server,established; tls.cert_issuer; content:"ZeroSSL"; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2031231; rev:3; metadata:created_at 2020_11_23, confidence High, signature_severity Informational, tag Description_Generated_By_Proofpoint_Nexus, updated_at 2022_12_01;)

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows
